title: apicra spiralis
intro: Apicra spiralis, also known as the Devil's Claw, is a plant species belonging to the Pedaliaceae family. The Apicra spiralis plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Apicra spiralis include reducing arthritis symptoms, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing menstrual cramps. Apicra spiralis is often prepared as a herbal tea or capsule and can be found in some health food stores and online retailers under the name Harpagophytum procumbens, its more commonly used scientific name.
